name: Organizational Decision
description: Simulates how a decision, announcement or policy propagates inside an organisation. Activity follows business hours; channels model a broadcast announcement stream and a threaded internal-discussion space.
prompt_framing: This is an organizational decision simulation. Agents are employees, managers and stakeholders reacting to an internal decision, reorg or policy change. Model hierarchy, alignment vs. resistance, water-cooler discussion, and how consensus or dissent forms across teams over several working days.
